query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dvao: dynamic variance-adaptive advantage optimization for multi-rewar" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology/survey for the "natural language state representation" component of the user's question, and criterion (b) by addressing the domain of Reinforcement Learning with natural language inputs, which is the necessary context for extending the DVAO algorithm to linguistics.
